name: spine
description: Spine's Claude Code plugin marketplace — delegate a ticket, get a reviewed PR.

plugins.name: spine
plugins.description: An AI-native SDLC engineer you delegate tickets to: build a repo's Product Knowledge Graph, ground new code in what already exists, generate + test it, and — on confirm — open a PR. Greenfield + brownfield across Python, Java, TypeScript, C#, C, and C++, exposed as MCP tools.
